---
name: Platform bring-up report
about: Help expand DCENT_OS to a miner that's in "bring-up" status
title: "[bringup] <miner model> "
labels: platform-bringup
---

Bring-up reports are some of the most valuable contributions to DCENT_OS — they're how coverage
expands. Thank you!

## Miner
- Model: <!-- e.g. Antminer S17 Pro -->
- Control board / SoC: <!-- Zynq vs Amlogic vs BeagleBone; chip family -->
- ASIC: <!-- BM1397 / BM1398 / BM1362 / BM1368 ... -->
- Stock firmware it shipped with:
- PSU:

## What you observed
<!-- Did chips enumerate? How many? Did it reach the pool? Accepted shares? Errors? -->

## Captures / logs
<!-- dcentrald log, chip enumeration counts, nonce/share counts, thermal readings.
     Real-hardware evidence is what turns a 🟡 bring-up into a ✅ mining-proven row. -->

```
(paste logs here)
```

## How far you got
- [ ] Daemon ran
- [ ] Chips enumerated
- [ ] Connected to pool
- [ ] Submitted shares
- [ ] Accepted shares
- [ ] Sustained mining

## Notes
Anything unusual about this unit (revision, IO board, modifications).
